parks.name: Ackerman Park
parks.description: Ackerman Park features West Ashley's skate park alongside multi-purpose field and dog park. It's a popular gathering spot for skaters and active recreation.

parks.name: Alberta Long Lake Park
parks.description: Situated along the water in Peninsula, Alberta Long Lake Park offers a scenic lakeside retreat. Amenities include fishing.

parks.name: Allan Park
parks.description: A tree-shaded neighborhood park in Peninsula, ideal for afternoon walks and a bit of fresh air.

parks.name: Angel Oak Park
parks.description: Angel Oak Park on Johns Island is home to the legendary Angel Oak, one of the oldest living things east of the Mississippi. Visitors come to marvel at the massive live oak's canopy and enjoy a picnic beneath its ancient branches.

parks.name: Ashley River Road Bike Path

parks.description: Bayview Soccer Complex in James Island packs restrooms, soccer, picnic area into a single destination. Whether you're here for a game, a walk, or a family outing, there's something for everyone.

parks.name: Bees Landing Recreation Complex
parks.description: Bees Landing Recreation Complex is West Ashley's premier multi-sport facility with baseball, basketball, tennis, a dog park, playground, and picnic areas. The sprawling complex serves as the neighborhood's athletic and community hub.
